title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.510 - Supreme court to provide rules for certain hearings
text:
454.510.  Supreme court to provide rules for certain hearings. — The supreme court of the state of Missouri may provide rules for expeditious hearings on all matters referred to the circuit court pursuant to this act*.
(L. 1982 S.B. 468 § 23) 
*"This act" (S.B. 468, 1982) contained numerous sections. Consult Disposition of Sections table for a definitive listing.
